6.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; may cause compilation error with modern compilers due to removal from C standard]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; may cause compilation error with modern compilers due to removal from C standard]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; many compilers no longer support it, leading to compilation errors. Use 'fgets' instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Use of unsafe function 'gets' which is deprecated and may cause buffer overflow; also, in some environments like newer GCC, 'gets' is removed entirely causing compilation error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from newer C standards; many compilers no longer support it, leading to compilation errors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; may cause compilation error with modern compilers due to removal from C standard]
